donutsmp_balance.config.title: DonutSMP Balance
donutsmp_balance.config.api_key.tooltip: Create a key in-game with /api. This key is used for all /stats API requests in the mod. For your own notes, use “Personal key registry” below — stored only in donutsmp-balance.json on this PC.
donutsmp_balance.config.registry.api_key: Notebook only: not sent anywhere. Copy a key here if you want it saved next to the username. The mod still uses the main “API key” above for requests unless you paste the same key there.
donutsmp_balance.config.show_self: Show above your own nametag (third person)
donutsmp_balance.config.allow_any_server: Normally the overlay only appears on DonutSMP (mc.donutsmp.net, etc.). Enable this to test on other multiplayer servers or if auto-detection fails.
donutsmp_balance.config.abbreviate_money: When enabled, numeric balances are shortened. Existing formats like 1M$ are kept as-is.
donutsmp_balance.overlay.no_key: Set API key in Mod Menu
donutsmp_balance.overlay.api_down: Donut API is down right now (502)
